## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss ongoing projects, challenges, and next steps for Okta's growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/jwxGkUmR12RpxhQsn1abtrnZrbAQE15A?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Internal Okta team working on tiering system; GrowthX to provide consultative support](https://fathom.video/share/jwxGkUmR12RpxhQsn1abtrnZrbAQE15A?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Enablement docs now include research sources and logic for data collection](https://fathom.video/share/jwxGkUmR12RpxhQsn1abtrnZrbAQE15A?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Exploring Common Room as a potential wrapper for insights and data integration](https://fathom.video/share/jwxGkUmR12RpxhQsn1abtrnZrbAQE15A?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Focus on measuring impact: pipeline generation, event metrics, and reducing stalled opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/jwxGkUmR12RpxhQsn1abtrnZrbAQE15A?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
